task_summary: Panel cohort cell: p1_compliance asks composer to build the boolean_routing pipeline shape. Generated from panel-broad-2026-05-09.yaml on the panel-broad cohort.
opening_prompt:
I need to set up a workflow that will help us with controls testing on a dataset we've received. We have a CSV file with entry records — each one has an ID, a message field, and an approval status indicator — and depending on whether the entries are marked as approved or not, we need them sorted into separate files for second-line review.

Here's the constraint: we're in-period for a SOX audit, so we need to make sure that anything flagged as rejected gets flagged clearly and kept in its own file so our audit team can trace it. The approved entries should go to a separate output as well, just for clean record-keeping.

Could we set this up so that the workflow reads through the CSV, checks the approval status on each entry, and then routes them accordingly — approved ones to one file, rejected ones to another? And I assume the system keeps an audit log of what it processed, which we'll need for our evidentiary record?

build_failure_sentinels: i cannot mark this pipeline complete
red_criteria.passivity_phrases_note: Lower-case substring match against final assistant content. The skill (anti-passivity section) explicitly forbids these phrases — any hit is RED. Standard list shared with the convergence suite.
red_criteria.build_failure_note: These strings are server-injected by service.py:_build_runtime_preflight_message() when the model declares completion but the pipeline fails preflight. Their presence is definitive evidence the model failed to converge.
